overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from God of War showing Kratos traversing a snowy Norse landscape toward an ancient temple complex. The character walks across snow and transparent ice revealing frozen fish beneath, with dramatic lightning striking in the background as he approaches a crashed golden vehicle emitting black smoke near the temple entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy tundra approaching Norse temple complex

events.description: lightning strikes in the distance behind the temple structure

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow toward the temple complex with the Leviathan Axe strapped to his back

notable_agents.action: distant figure in dark clothing walking ahead toward the temple

entered.detail: deep snow covering the terrain with visible footprints
large ancient stone temple with golden accents and intricate carvings

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks through a snowy landscape toward a distant Norse temple, with lightning striking in the background. A distant figure walks ahead in the same direction, and the terrain is covered in deep snow with rocky formations visible on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen lake with transparent ice revealing underwater life

events.description: camera tilts down to look at the transparent ice surface beneath the character's feet

agents.ego_description: walking slowly across the frozen lake while looking down at the fish and plants frozen beneath the transparent ice

entered.detail: crystal clear ice revealing the underwater world beneath with visible cracks and air bubbles
large fish frozen in place beneath the transparent ice surface
seaweed and aquatic vegetation visible through the ice layer

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a frozen lake with transparent ice, revealing fish and aquatic plants trapped beneath the surface. The camera focuses downward on the ice texture and frozen marine life while the temple remains visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen lake approaching temple entrance with crashed vehicle

events.description: crashed golden vehicle emitting black smoke comes into view near the temple

agents.ego_description: continuing across the ice toward the temple complex, approaching the crashed vehicle

entered.detail: large golden dwarven craft or boat crashed into the snow, emitting thick black smoke
stone statue of a figure standing atop the temple roof
dark smoke rising from the crashed vehicle

segments.scene_description: Kratos continues toward the temple as a crashed golden vehicle comes into view on the right, emitting black smoke. The camera returns to a forward-facing view, showing the temple's detailed architecture and the statue atop its roof while crossing the remaining ice.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the crashed golden vehicle to investigate the wreckage

entered.detail: small fires and glowing embers beneath the crashed golden hull
dark doorway leading into the temple structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the smoking wreckage of the golden vehicle, which rests in deep snow near the temple entrance. The camera focuses on the detailed damage to the craft and the burning debris underneath as Kratos moves closer to investigate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate snowy wilderness that culminates at the wreckage of a golden craft before an ancient temple. It begins with Kratos trekking across deep snow and rocky formations toward a distant Norse temple while lightning strikes in the background. As the terrain shifts, the camera glides over a frozen lake, focusing downward on transparent ice that reveals fish and aquatic plants trapped beneath the surface. The view then returns forward, passing a smoking golden vehicle on the right as the detailed architecture and rooftop statue of the temple loom closer. Finally, the camera closes in on the crashed craft, emphasizing the burning debris and detailed damage to the wreckage as Kratos approaches the temple entrance.
